source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH NowUTC AS (
  SELECT CAST(SYSUTCDATETIME() AS date) AS TodayUTC,
         CAST(SYSUTCDATETIME() AS datetime2(0)) AS LastRefreshUtc
),
Bounds AS (
  SELECT
    LastRefreshUtc,
    DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(TodayUTC),1,1) AS StartOfYTD,
    TodayUTC                           AS EndDate
  FROM NowUTC
),



--########### Net Promoter Score ############

/*
--Satisfaction %

NPS_Score AS 
(
	SELECT 
	(Promoter_NPS - Detractor_NPS ) AS NPS
	FROM
	(
	
		SELECT 
		( Promoter_Count * 1.000  / InstallationCount * 1.000 ) AS Promoter_NPS,
		( Detractor_Count * 1.000 / InstallationCount * 1.000 ) AS Detractor_NPS
		FROM
		(
			SELECT 
			COUNT(DISTINCT Survey_ID)						AS InstallationCount ,
			COUNT(DISTINCT Promoter_Survey_ID ) - 1		AS Promoter_Count,
			COUNT(DISTINCT Detractor_Survey_ID) - 1		AS Detractor_Count
			FROM
			(
				SELECT 
				Survey_ID,
				Response_Date,
				CASE WHEN Service_NPS>=9					THEN Survey_ID ELSE 0 END AS Promoter_Survey_ID,
				CASE WHEN Service_NPS>=0 AND Service_NPS<=6 THEN Survey_ID ELSE 0 END AS Detractor_Survey_ID
				FROM EDW.FACT_MEDALLIA_CUSTOMER_SURVEY M
				WHERE Program in ('Installation Experience New','Installation Experience')
				AND ActiveInd = 1
				AND Service_NPS IS NOT NULL
				
				) M1
		
			CROSS JOIN Bounds b
			WHERE TRY_CONVERT(date, M1.Response_Date) >= b.StartOfYTD
			AND TRY_CONVERT(date, M1.Response_Date) <  DATEADD(day,1,b.EndDate)
		
			) M2
		
		) M3
		
	),
	
*/

NPS_Score AS 
(

  SELECT
    COUNT_BIG(*)                      AS Responses,
    AVG(CAST(m.Service_NPS AS float)) AS AvgScore
	FROM EDW.FACT_Medallia_Customer_survey m
	CROSS JOIN Bounds b
	WHERE TRY_CONVERT(date, m.Response_Date) >= b.StartOfYTD
    AND TRY_CONVERT(date, m.Response_Date) <  DATEADD(day,1,b.EndDate)
    AND m.Service_NPS BETWEEN 0 AND 10
	
	),

--########### Service Calls resolved ############	

ServiceCalls AS 
(

  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS ServiceCallsResolved
	FROM EDW.FACT_JOB_SERVICE S
	JOIN [EDW].[DIM_SERVICE_STATUS] SS
	ON S.ServiceStatusID = SS.ServiceStatusID
  
	CROSS JOIN Bounds b
	WHERE TRY_CONVERT(date, S.CompletionDate) >= b.StartOfYTD
    AND TRY_CONVERT(date, S.CompletionDate) <  DATEADD(day,1,b.EndDate)
	AND SS.ServiceStatus = 'Complete'
	
),



--########### Homeowners Helped ############	

Homeowners AS (

	SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) AS HomeownersHelpedYTD
	FROM 
	(
	
		SELECT
		S.CustomerID
		FROM EDW.FACT_JOB_SERVICE S
		JOIN [EDW].[DIM_SERVICE_STATUS] SS
		ON S.ServiceStatusID = SS.ServiceStatusID
	
		CROSS JOIN Bounds b
		WHERE TRY_CONVERT(date, S.CompletionDate) >= b.StartOfYTD
		AND TRY_CONVERT(date, S.CompletionDate) <  DATEADD(day,1,b.EndDate)
		AND SS.ServiceStatus = 'Complete' -- Check what status is needed
		--AND SS.ServiceStatus IS NOT NULL   **** CHeck
		
		
		UNION 
		
		SELECT 
		CustomerID
		FROM 
		(
			SELECT A.JobID,A.CustomerID,
			CASE 
				WHEN A.Division='FHI' AND B.MilestoneDateTypeID='FHI-8' THEN B.ActualDate
				WHEN A.Division='MAC' AND B.MilestoneDateTypeID='MAC-1' THEN B.ActualDate
				WHEN A.Division='MXH' AND B.MilestoneDateTypeID='MXH-A' THEN B.ActualDate
				WHEN A.Division='PBC' AND B.MilestoneDateTypeID='PBC-37' THEN B.ActualDate
				WHEN A.Division='CTA' AND B.MilestoneDateTypeID='CTA-E' THEN B.ActualDate
				WHEN A.Division='RTW' AND B.MilestoneDateTypeID='RTW-Q' THEN B.ActualDate
				--WHEN A.Division='SWR' AND B.MilestoneDateTypeID='FHI-8' THEN B.ActualDate
				END AS ActualDate
			FROM EDW.FACT_JOB A 
			JOIN  EDW.FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL B
			ON A.JobID = B.JobID
			
			) M1 
		
		CROSS JOIN Bounds b
		WHERE TRY_CONVERT(date, M1.ActualDate) >= b.StartOfYTD
		AND TRY_CONVERT(date, M1.ActualDate) <  DATEADD(day,1,b.EndDate)
		
		
		) MX
	
	  

),



--########### Installs Completed ############	

Installs AS (

SELECT Count(DISTINCT JobID) AS InstallsCompletedYTD 
FROM 
(
	SELECT A.JobID,A.CustomerID,
	CASE 
		WHEN A.Division='FHI' AND B.MilestoneDateTypeID='FHI-8' THEN B.ActualDate
		WHEN A.Division='MAC' AND B.MilestoneDateTypeID='MAC-1' THEN B.ActualDate
		WHEN A.Division='MXH' AND B.MilestoneDateTypeID='MXH-A' THEN B.ActualDate
		WHEN A.Division='PBC' AND B.MilestoneDateTypeID='PBC-37' THEN B.ActualDate
		WHEN A.Division='CTA' AND B.MilestoneDateTypeID='CTA-E' THEN B.ActualDate
		WHEN A.Division='RTW' AND B.MilestoneDateTypeID='RTW-Q' THEN B.ActualDate
		WHEN A.Division='SWR' AND B.MilestoneDateTypeID='SWR-C' THEN B.ActualDate
		END AS ActualDate
	FROM EDW.FACT_JOB A 
	JOIN  EDW.FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL B
	ON A.JobID = B.JobID

	) M1 

 CROSS JOIN Bounds b
 WHERE TRY_CONVERT(date, M1.ActualDate) >= b.StartOfYTD
 AND TRY_CONVERT(date, M1.ActualDate) <  DATEADD(day,1,b.EndDate)



)




SELECT
  b.LastRefreshUtc AS LastRefreshUTC,
  i.InstallsCompletedYTD,
  sc.ServiceCallsResolved,
  h.HomeownersHelpedYTD,
  --n.NPS
  CAST(n.AvgScore/2.0 AS decimal(9,2)) AS NpsOutOf5

FROM Bounds b
CROSS JOIN Installs i
CROSS JOIN ServiceCalls sc
CROSS JOIN Homeowners h
CROSS JOIN NPS_Score n;
